name: nino-chavez-studio
description: Nino Chavez ⊕ studio brand style — Commerce architecture grounded in reality
basePrompt:
BRAND: Signal Dispatch — a strategic technology newsletter by Nino Chavez.
AESTHETIC: Dark, professional, tech-focused. Minimalist with purpose.

VISUAL LANGUAGE:
- Signal waveforms, circuit-like patterns, geometric nodes
- Abstract data visualization, flowing lines
- Network topology patterns, subtle grid systems
- Near-black backgrounds with coral/cyan accent highlights
- Clean lines, no ornamental flourishes

default.lineColor: Critical Orange (#e86c5d) with Blueprint Steel (#4a90bb) accents
default.style: Evidence-driven: backs every recommendation with data and real-world examples, Self-critical: openly acknowledges limitations and questions own assumptions, Implementation-focused: prioritizes what works over what sounds impressive, Transparently direct: delivers uncomfortable truths without corporate sugar-coating, Process-methodical: breaks complex problems into systematic, repeatable approaches, Skeptically practical: challenges conventional wisdom with hands-on experience aesthetic
default.elements: dark, minimal, technical, geometric, signal, network
default.personality: Evidence-driven: backs every recommendation with data and real-world examples, Self-critical: openly acknowledges limitations and questions own assumptions, Implementation-focused: prioritizes what works over what sounds impressive, Transparently direct: delivers uncomfortable truths without corporate sugar-coating, Process-methodical: breaks complex problems into systematic, repeatable approaches, Skeptically practical: challenges conventional wisdom with hands-on experience

conceptMap.signal: abstract signal waveform, frequency pattern, data stream
conceptMap.network: network topology nodes and edges, connected systems
conceptMap.circuit: circuit board patterns, technical traces, PCB aesthetic
conceptMap.data: data visualization, flowing lines, abstract charts
conceptMap.grid: subtle background grid, technical graph paper
